objective: Increase caregiver response to seasonal planning content and convert high-intent readers to checklist downloads.

signal.summary: Caregivers are asking for simple fall planning guidance before routines become chaotic.
evidence: Support inbox saw a rise in fall planning questions.
Recent calls mention medication, transportation, and appointment coordination.

strategy.angle: Frame early planning as an act of care that reduces stress for the whole family.
strategy.cta: Download the fall care checklist and share it with one family member.

notes: Keep advice operational and supportive, not diagnostic.

creative.headline: Before fall gets busy, make caregiving feel lighter
creative.copy: Fall routine changes can sneak up on families. GiveCare helps you turn that stress into one clear next step with a checklist you can actually use.

deliverables.notes: Lead with reassurance and one concrete next step.
Emphasize family coordination and practical relief.
Keep copy short and visual-caption friendly.
